description: Use this API to specify the parameters of the scales used for plotting the results of PV and QV analysis. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. setfullviewgrapharea(area, vaxisshow, vaxisstyle, vaxisclr, vgridshow, vgridstyle, vgridclr, haxisshow, haxisstyle, haxisclr, hgridshow, hgridstyle, hgridclr, bordershow, borderstyle, borderclr, setareaclr, areaclr)
python_syntax: setfullviewgrapharea(area, vaxisshow, vaxisstyle, vaxisclr, vgridshow, vgridstyle, vgridclr, haxisshow, haxisstyle, haxisclr, hgridshow, hgridstyle, hgridclr, bordershow, borderstyle, borderclr, setareaclr, areaclr)

parameters.name: vaxisstyle
parameters.description: Style of the vertical axis. valid only if vaxisshow=1. (input).

parameters.name: vaxisclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of the vertical axis. Valid only if VAXISSHOW=1. (input).

parameters.name: vgridstyle
parameters.description: Style of the vertical grid. valid only if vgridshow =1. (input).

parameters.name: vgridclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of the vertical grid. Valid only if VGRIDSHOW =1. (input).

parameters.name: haxisstyle
parameters.description: Style of the horizontal axis. valid only if haxisshow=1. (input).

parameters.name: haxisclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of the horizontal axis. Valid only if HAXISSHOW=1. (input).

parameters.name: hgridstyle
parameters.description: Style of the horizontal grid. valid only if hgridshow =1. (input).

parameters.name: hgridclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of the horizontal grid. Valid only if HGRIDSHOW =1. (input).

parameters.name: bordershow
parameters.description: Show (or not) the border around the plot. (input).

parameters.name: borderstyle
parameters.description: Style of the border. valid only if bordershow =1. (input).

parameters.name: borderclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of the border. Valid only if BORDERSHOW =1. (input).

parameters.name: setareaclr
parameters.description: Set (or not) the back color of the plotting area. (input).

parameters.name: areaclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of the plotting area. Valid only if SETAREACLR =1. (input).

area.description: QV analysis, area for Q(V) plot.
QV analysis, area for mismatch plot.
PV analysis, area for bus voltage.
PV analysis, area for generator MW.
PV analysis, area for branch MVA flow.
PV analysis, area for interface MW flow.
PV analysis, area for bus voltage against interface flow.

vaxisclr.description: Red component; the value between 0 and 255.
Green component; the value between 0 and 255.
Blue component; the value between 0 and 255.

vgridclr.description: Red component; the value between 0 and 255.
Green component; the value between 0 and 255.
Blue component; the value between 0 and 255.

haxisclr.description: Red component; the value between 0 and 255.
Green component; the value between 0 and 255.
Blue component; the value between 0 and 255.

hgridclr.description: Red component; the value between 0 and 255.
Green component; the value between 0 and 255.
Blue component; the value between 0 and 255.

borderclr.description: Red component; the value between 0 and 255.
Green component; the value between 0 and 255.
Blue component; the value between 0 and 255.

areaclr.description: Red component; the value between 0 and 255.
Green component; the value between 0 and 255.
Blue component; the value between 0 and 255.
